meta.source: CHFA Program Inventory + HUD LIHTC Database
meta.note: Static program definitions updated annually from CHFA QAP. Rebuild via scripts/market/fetch_chfa_programs.py

programs.name: 9% Low Income Housing Tax Credit
programs.notes: Competitive annual LIHTC from CHFA; statewide basis allocation

programs.name: 4% Low Income Housing Tax Credit + Bonds
programs.notes: Non-competitive; paired with tax-exempt bonds; QCT/DDA boost to 30%

programs.name: CHFA HOME Investment Partnerships
programs.notes: Federal HOME funds administered by CHFA; rental housing

programs.name: Community Development Block Grant (CDBG)
programs.notes: Via DOLA for small cities and rural areas; housing rehabilitation

programs.name: Transit-Oriented Development (TOD) Fund
programs.notes: Preservation and new construction near transit; Denver metro focus

programs.name: National Housing Trust Fund (HTF)
programs.notes: Targets extremely low income; paired with 9% LIHTC

programs.name: CHFA Affordable Housing Loan
programs.notes: Below-market permanent financing; paired with LIHTC projects

programs.name: Rental Assistance Demonstration (RAD)
programs.notes: HUD-driven conversion of public housing to Section 8 project-based
